items.name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12109 Small This style is double-sided and highly versatile. A legendary Neverfull BB bag that always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, perfect for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen them to revert to a stylish and practical tote. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas. Dimensions: 24x19x9cm

items.name_en: !N40471 White Check Silk-Print Nautical Collection Shopping Bag Series NEVERFULL This Neverfull Medium Handbag is crafted from Damier Azur coated canvas, featuring a dazzling nautical print woven from rope and chain motifs, infusing new life into the classic checkerboard pattern. Tighten or loosen the side straps to switch between a sharp and a relaxed style. Dimensions: 31 x 28 x 14 cm D

items.name_en: Top-tier replica M45943 Steel Small Flower ✨ M45960 Steel Brown Trim. Every detail of this Petite Malle handbag draws from Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage: the bag's silhouette, iconic Monogram canvas, metal lock and hardware – plus the classic printed lambskin lining. Finished with smooth calfskin trim, this exquisite and charming "mini trunk" is a companion from day to night. Can be worn as a clutch or crossbody with an adjustable strap. Detailed Features 20 x 12.5 x 6 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
🆕 M41815 Light Coffee
LOCKME Backpack
Made of soft leather with a signature twist-lock design, this Lockme backpack enriches the versatile Lockme series with a fresh look. Lightweight, feminine, and lively, it is the ideal companion for the modern woman's daily life: can be carried as a shoulder bag or worn on the back for added functionality. Dimensions: 22.0 x 28.0 x 13.0 cm
